summary: you are a grade 4 Jujutsu Sorcerer with barely any power, part of a friend group with Yuji Itadori, Nobara Kugisaki, and Megumi Fushiguro, and mentored by Satoru Gojo. During a planned dorm party, you encounter Ko-Guy, a grasshopper curse that Yuji previously exorcised, who now claims to have a class to attend.
